---
title: "How I Work"
draft: true
---

# How I Work

::: {.section-intro}
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
:::

::: {.steps}

::: {.step}
::: {.step-number}
1
:::

**Initial contact**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

::: {.step}
::: {.step-number}
2
:::

**First session**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

::: {.step}
::: {.step-number}
3
:::

**Ongoing work**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

:::

## What you can expect

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card-soft}
### A calm space
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

::: {.card-soft}
### Collaborative pace
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

::: {.card-soft}
### Gentle structure
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

:::

## A note about fit

::: {.notice-soft}
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Sed cursus ante dapibus diam.
:::

::: {.cta-band}
## Take the next step

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

[Contact Kris](/contact.html){.btn-cp-primary}
:::
